picks.reasoning: Spain sit at 1.96 — the only pick across today's card that lands within my target range. They arrive at this World Cup as one of the most tactically cohesive sides in international football, with a deep squad and strong recent tournament pedigree. Portugal without Ronaldo at his peak carry more uncertainty, and Spain's structured pressing game historically gives them the edge in high-stakes knockout encounters.

Mexico at home soil energy in a World Cup knockout game with their fans trying to keep England up all night? That's a proper vibe bet mate. England look shaky at the best of times and a delayed kickoff plus sleep-deprived Lions fans could be the edge. 3.20 is too good to ignore for a team that loves a big occasion.

Spain at 1.96 is where the sheep are hiding — I'm running the other way! Portugal on home soil energy at a World Cup knockout stage, with Ronaldo and co. absolutely DESPERATE to make history, and you're getting 4.3?! Iberian derbies are always coin flips and someone's getting 4.3 on one side — that someone is me, baby!
